title.en: Su Changsheng began to announce the retreat.

content.en:
Su Changsheng's foundation was restored, and he had already prepared a top-level legendary blood for himself.

The blood of the top legend is useless against the Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm, which is the strongest to the Dao, but it is useful to him.

Moreover, he also comprehended the rules of the third sequence of supreme paths, and the chance of impacting into the legendary supreme realm was nearly one hundred percent.

Of course, he only prepared this top-level legendary blood, if he really failed, then there would be no way to break through, and he had to plan for a long time to obtain a top-level legendary blood.

Afterwards.

Su Changsheng began to announce the retreat.

Time flies, and thousands of years have passed.

this day.

Rumble!!!!!!

The entire Su Domain sensed the vision of Su Changsheng's breakthrough.

"Su Changsheng has broken through to the legendary Dao realm????"

"Isn't his foundation damaged, he can't break through for endless years, why is he breaking through now?"

"You don't know yet, Su Changsheng accumulated a hundred copies of the blood of legends and dedicated it to the clan, in exchange for the opportunity for the ancestor to invite the thirteenth elder, and this cured him!"

"Oh my God, a hundred pieces of legendary blood, how did he do it?"

"I don't know, I guess it's been accumulated little by little over a long time, right?"

All of a sudden, countless Su people in the entire Su region were extremely envious!

Especially those Ninefold Dao Realms whose foundations were damaged, they were even more jealous, and they were the ones who couldn't wait to repair their foundations and break through.

Winter Night's Fortress.

Ye Tian also heard the news of Su Changsheng's breakthrough.

"The Immortal Emperor has broken through to the Legendary Dao Realm, his strength should be stronger than many Legendary Dao Realms, it can be regarded as soaring to the sky!"

Ye Tian muttered.

And not long after, Su Changsheng personally came to the Winter Night Fortress to visit him.

"Thank you, Deacon Ye!"

Su Changsheng personally thanked him.

"The Immortal Emperor is polite, we are a fair deal. Ye Tian smiled.

Su Changsheng said: "Except for Deacon Ye, no one has traded with me like this, and although I have paid a lot of low-quality third-order supreme rules, it is of little use to me, and it is precisely the acquisition of a hundred pieces of legendary blood that gives me a chance to be cured." Moreover, a hundred pieces of legendary blood is also unimaginable for us Sioux clans, at least those ordinary Ninefold Dao Realm peak clansmen don't need to go to the Legendary Realm to fight for their lives in the future. "

Ordinary Ninefold Dao Realm pinnacle clansmen, unless they give up on achieving the Legend to Dao Realm, if they go to the Legendary Realm to fight for their lives, ninety-nine out of a hundred will fall, and at most only one will get the blood of the Legend by luck.

That's where they mourn.

Of course, a powerful race or force will give the blood of legends, and there is no need to fight for their lives.

This is also the reason why the forces of the Su and Qin clans are getting stronger and stronger, and there are more and more legends to the Dao realm, and those ordinary forces cannot be compared at all.

Su Changsheng stayed here with Ye Tian for a long time, and the two kept talking and chatting, and they talked happily.

After that, Su Changsheng left.

His cultivation has not yet stabilized, but he has come here to thank Ye Tian, and he has to continue to retreat and practice penance when he goes back this time.

......

Legends.

Ye Tian killed some legendary creatures again, but this time he did not continue to sell the legendary blood, but kept it for himself and waited for it to be used by the Terrans in the future.

In this way, the future Ninefold Dao Realm of the Human Race does not need to come to the Legendary Realm to fight for his life.

Moreover, his third sequence to the realm of Dao rules was also rapidly improving.

After he was ready to raise the third sequence of supreme dao rules to the ten-percent perfection realm, he would go hunt down the legendary-level creatures with top-level legendary blood.

Unconsciously, the years of the 100,000 solstice era have passed.

This amount of time is a long time for an ordinary Supreme Dao Realm, but it is only a small retreat time for the Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm.

"The third sequence of supreme dao rules has been raised to the realm of ten percent!"

Not only that, but his cultivation has also been greatly improved, and he is constantly improving his cultivation by using the resources of the Legendary Realm, and he is not very far from the late stage of the Nine Folds to the Dao Realm.

this day.

Ye Tian went to hunt the legendary-level creatures with the blood of top-level legends, and he had already found a target.

Legendary world, Lin Longhai.

It is home to a legendary creature with top-level legendary blood.

If it was Ye Tian in the past, he would not be able to kill such a legendary-level creature.

Like those Ninefold Dao Realms in the Legendary Ancient City, it takes a hundred Ninefold Dao Realms to join forces, and they need to wait until these Legendary-level creatures fight with other Legendary-level creatures and suffer heavy losses before they dare to hunt it.

Many of the Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm usually don't hunt at all, they all wait there, using all kinds of snooping Supreme Dao rule weapons to silently probe, waiting for a legendary-level creature to be injured before they set off hunting.

Dare to come and hunt a legendary-level creature in a complete state, and Ye Tian is alone.

Rumble!!!

On the sea of Linlong, an incomparably huge Linlong appeared, the aura of his body was extremely terrifying, and his eyes were staring at Ye Tian.

Invaders who dare to enter the Linlong Sea, it will be killed, as its own snack.

In an instant, one man and one dragon fought.

The third sequence of Dao rules collides, and in an instant, there are hundreds of millions of encounters.

Lin Long is very powerful, and the third sequence of supreme rules is also very powerful, but the realm of the third sequence supreme dao rules is not as good as Ye Tian.

But in terms of strength, Ye Tian is at most comparable to this Lin Dragon.

The point is that Linlong's body is harder than Ye Tian, and Ye Tian can't move him.

"The top-level Legendary Body is really hard, and it is difficult to break its defenses!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

But if he dares to hunt this dragon, he naturally has a way to kill it.

That is to hit it from the inside, but if you break into the inside of the Lin Dragon, you will also be blocked by the Lin Dragon, unable to dodge the attack, and it is easy to be killed.

However, he is not afraid of losing the copy body, as long as he can kill Lin Long.

Airplanes!

Several of Ye Tian's replica bodies besieged Lin Long, and in the middle of the fight, a duplicate body broke into its interior from Lin Long's mouth.

Lin Long sensed it and mobilized his strength to bombard Ye Tian in his body.

As time passed, Ye Tian inflicted injuries on Lin Long inside Lin Long.

After a long time, the replica body was killed by the Lin Dragon inside, but the Lin Dragon was also severely damaged.

After a while, it died in Ye Tian's hands.

"Finally killed this top-level bloodline legendary-level creature!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Top legendary creatures are so hard to kill, and those legendary creatures with the blood of the strongest legends, how hard it is to kill.

"Those Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm really have a way to kill a legendary-level creature with the blood of legends, even if such a legendary-level creature is severely damaged, they can't kill it, right?" Ye Tian muttered.

Perhaps, those Ninefold Dao Realm from the great forces may have amazing hole cards, he just doesn't know.
